title: Oceania Kitchen
description: every country 5 foods (not all country's yet)
body:
# Oceania’s Kitchen – A Minecraft Culinary Expansion
Oceania’s Kitchen is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of Oceanian-inspired foods to enhance your in-game culinary experience. This mod adds five unique food items from every Oceanian country, allowing players to discover and craft regional dishes using Minecraft’s survival and cooking mechanics.

Features:
- Authentic Oceanian Dishes – Craft a selection of foods from different Oceanian countries, each with unique ingredients and recipes.

- New Ingredients – Gather region-specific ingredients to prepare traditional meals.

- Cooking Equipment – Utilize specialized tools and crafting methods inspired by Oceanian kitchens.

- Expanded Food Variety – Enjoy an enriched food system that adds depth to survival gameplay.

This mod is designed for players who enjoy food-related gameplay enhancements and want to explore diverse culinary traditions in Minecraft. Experience the flavors of Oceania as you expand your Minecraft world’s cuisine!
(currently in here is: papua new guinea and marshall island with 5 dishes each)
